name: Nomad
description: A wanderer of the deserts with strong navigation and survival instincts. Skill Proficiencies: Nature, Survival. Tool Proficiency: Navigator's Tools. Equipment Option A: Shortbow, 20 Arrows, Navigator's Tools, Bedroll, Quiver, Tent, Traveler's Clothes, 3 CP. Equipment Option B: 50 CP. Feature: Wanderer.
